plugins.name: ahoo-fetcher-skills
plugins.description: Skills for building with the Fetcher TypeScript ecosystem, including HTTP clients, decorators, event buses, SSE/OpenAI streaming, storage, CoSec authentication, Wow CQRS, OpenAPI generation, React hooks, and viewer components.

interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Fetcher skills for TypeScript HTTP clients, OpenAPI generation, streaming, React hooks, storage, CoSec authentication, Wow CQRS, and viewer components.
